answer:
The intensity given is the average power per unit area, which for an electromagnetic wave is \( I = \frac{1}{2} c \varepsilon_0 E_0^2 \). Solving for the electric field amplitude gives \( E_0 \approx 1.01 \times 10^3 \, \text{V/m} \), and the magnetic field amplitude is \( B_0 = E_0 / c \approx 3.37 \times 10^{-6} \, \text{T} \) (or Wb/m²).  

\boxed{C}
